title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Orochi, Unknown person #5, Udon Prisoners as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our Allies are being taken captive one by one...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: By kaidou and Crochi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're under arrest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: JGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There it is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mark of the crescent moon and the coded message!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UWAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone with this mark on their ankles is a traitor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you see some- one with it, report it to us immedi- lately!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rumours are spreading too quickly. The whole capital knows about it already.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't even patrol the bathhouse leisurely anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Good for you, Drake.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's that supposed to mean!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're the reason our targets escaped!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Flower Capital - The Pleasure District

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like Komurasaki's wake was cancelled, boss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we have that many distraught people grouped together, something bad's bound to happen.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There will be even more chaos at her funeral tomorrow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Plenty of people are angry at you, boss Kyo- Shiro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...what are you saying...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was no other way to handle that situation. I'm the one suffering the most from her death, anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's true.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi is angry right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Because of this, isn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Stop it, both of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: fighting isn't going to solve anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: One should always trust their friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Besides, I didn't even see any- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're the least trust- worthy person here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How is it possible for a person's face to look like that...? How hard did she hit him...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bear and your other comrades must have leaked our plans!!! No doubt about it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bepo and the others would rather die than betray us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't under- estimate them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Once we save them, you'll believe it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait!! We'll be falling right into the enemy's trap if we do that, Tra-Guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Udon Prisoners
dialogue.text: Prisoners should be disposed of!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THEY MUST BE SILENCED!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're scary, shinobu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHAT'D YOU SAY!?

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: THAT IS COMMON SENSE FOR NINJAS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This isn't a game!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have been waiting 20 years for this oppor- Tunity!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we fail now, we'll never have another chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop it, Shino- BU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Master Kan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: things do not always go as planned!! I understand your frustration, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allying with these people who share our goal is a miracle in and of itself!! If we lose their assistance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will be unable to carry out Lord Oden's wishes!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
